summary: The UK provides comprehensive digital justice and legal aid services including the Legal Aid Eligibility Checker on GOV.UK, online money claims (small claims), online divorce applications, and the Find a Court or Tribunal service. The HMCTS (HM Courts & Tribunals Service) Reform Programme has digitized many court processes.

sources.title: Check if you can get legal aid - GOV.UK

notes: The HMCTS Reform Programme has introduced online services for civil money claims, divorce, probate, and social security appeals. The Find a Court or Tribunal tool provides location, contact, and jurisdiction information for all courts in England and Wales.
